handshake {"server_version":200,"connection_time":"20260405 12:00:00 CET"}
server managed_accounts {"accounts":["DU12345"]}
server next_valid_id {"order_id":1001}
client req_historical_ticks {"req_id":"$req1"}
server historical_ticks {"req_id":"$req1","ticks":[{"time":"1712345678","price":"170.50","size":"100"},{"time":"1712345679","price":"170.55","size":"200"}],"done":true}
disconnect
